programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Life and death imitates art as a murder matches that of a 1960s horror film.

programme.title: Hard Cash
programme.desc: This fast-paced crime thriller stars Christian Slater and Val Kilmer. Released from prison, an infamous thief and his new crew pull off a brilliant robbery and become embroiled with a corrupt FBI agent when they discover the money is marked.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: As a mercenary, John Seeger (Steven Seagal) has a reputation that precedes him. That's why he's being blackmailed into performing a risky job: breaking the son of a wealthy arms dealer out of a South African prison. With his friends taken hostage, Seeger agrees to do the deed -- but finds out too late that he's been double-crossed. Not one who likes being taken for a fool, Seeger hatches an elaborate plan to get even that will make the prison break look like capture the flag.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: King Arthur and his Knights of the Round Table embark on a surreal.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A former getaway driver jeopardizes his Witness Protection Plan.

programme.title: Silent Hill Revelation
programme.desc: When her adoptive father disappears, Sharon Da Silva is drawn into a strange and terrifying alternate reality that holds answers to the horrific nightmares that have plagued her since childhood.

programme.title: The Forgotten
programme.desc: A grieving mother struggles to cope with the loss of her 8-year-old son. She is stunned when her psychiatrist tells her she has created eight years of memories of a son she never had. When she meets a fellow patient who had a similar experience, she embarks on a mission to prove her son s existence and her sanity.

programme.title: Young Guns
programme.desc: Western adventure, based on a true story, about six young men hired to guard an Englishman s ranch against a mob in 1870s New Mexico. Edited for Television

programme.title: RV
programme.desc: Overworked executive Bob Munroe persuades his wife and children to give up their Hawaiian vacation for some "family bonding" on a cross-country RV trip. But it s all a ruse. Bob has other, more career-oriented reasons on his mind than spending quality time with his family in the Rocky Mountains. Through a series of misadventures, including constant run-ins with an overly friendly troupe of full-time RV ers, Bob inadvertently learns the true meaning of family.

programme.title: I'll Do Anything
programme.desc: She's the most maddening female he's ever met, and she's only six years old.

programme.title: Surrender, Dorothy
programme.desc: After a young woman dies in a tragic car accident, her mother (Diane Keaton) copes with the loss by visiting her daughter's friends when they fail to attend the funeral.

programme.title: The Big Heat

programme.title: The Awful Truth
programme.desc: The screwball antics of a couple (Irene Dunne and Cary Grant) who can t stand being married, but can t stand to see the other married to anyone else.

programme.title: The Guilt of Janet Ames
programme.desc: Rosalind Russell stars in this complex psychological drama about a woman whose husband is killed in World War II while saving the lives of five comrades. She sets out for some sort of revenge, but when she is struck by a truck and paralyzed, a boozy reporter (Melvyn Douglas) thinks she can walk again and uses psychology to help her. But what she also doesn’t know is - he’s one of the five men on her list!

programme.desc: Henry Spencer tries to survive his industrial environment, his angry girlfriend, and the unbearable screams of his newborn mutant child.

programme.title: The Brood
programme.desc: A man tries to uncover an unconventional psychologist's therapy techniques on his institutionalized wife.

programme.desc: Partnered with a sly competitor, a high schooler plays an online game of dare that takes a sinister turn.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Space Ranger
programme.desc: The Space Ranger program, set up to protect humans from intergalactic threats in the future, is opened back up when a new threat arrives on Earth, threatening to destroy humanity once and for all.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Wolf Pack
programme.desc: A physician is forced to join an elite mercenary unit in the hopes of uncovering the truth about his father's death. Soon, the group discovers a dangerous conspiracy that can threaten the lives of millions.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: The life story of Yip Man, the first person to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Master Ip, a new arrival in British-occupied Hong Kong, wants to open a martial arts academy to teach his unique Wing Chun style. A corrupt group of martial arts masters, led by Master Hung refuses to allow him to teach in peace until he proves himself as a kung fu master.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: Martial-arts master Ip Man (Donnie Yen) takes on a crooked developer (Mike Tyson) and his gang of brutal thugs.

programme.title: Amber's Story
programme.desc: The true story of the kidnapping of Amber Hagerman and how her family came together to help abducted children

programme.title: The Secrets of Comfort House
programme.desc: A murder investigation in a small town focuses on Wendy Sinclair, who runs a shelter for the victims' wives.

programme.title: Ties that Bind
programme.desc: Detective takes in her jailed brothers unruley teenagers whilst looking after her own and solving crime.

programme.title: What Happened Last Night
programme.desc: Two college students, Danny and Sarah, are strangers until they wake up together after a night of partying.

programme.title: Romantic Friction
programme.desc: Artist Lea pretends to be the author of a hit romance novel written by Michael, leading to love.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Following a traumatic experience, former Special Forces member Dean Cage (Wesley Snipes) is trying to pick up the pieces of his fractured life. With the help of detective Amy Knight (Jacqueline Obradors), Dean tries to block out the painful wartime memories, including the death of his best friend. Everything goes awry, however, when Dean is mistaken for a rogue CIA agent. He is abducted and given a truth serum, and now he must find an antidote to the debilitating psychotropic drug.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: James must move in with his girlfriend of three months after being evicted from his place, and soon he discovers that he doesn't want to be with her anymore. His hope is to get her to break up with him but still let him sleep on the couch.

programme.title: The Recall
programme.desc: When five friends vacation at a remote lake house they expect nothing less than a good time, unaware that planet Earth is under an alien invasion and mass-abduction.

programme.title: Animal 2
programme.desc: James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) took the fall for the crimes of his older son (Vicellous Shannon) and is now serving a life term at Folsom Prison. When his younger son, James Jr. (K.C. Collins), is framed for murder, Allen refuses to let two men from the same family submit to life imprisonment for crimes they didn't commit. When he learns that James Jr. was set up by someone at the prison, he resolves to win his son's freedom. To do this, he must return to his violent brawler roots.

programme.title: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Mike tries to get out of the drug trade to save his little sister, Angel, and leaves her with John (Cuba Gooding Jr.), an undercover cop. Mike is killed, and the drug lords kidnap Angel, forcing John to use all of his skills to save the innocent girl.

programme.title: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: A self-absorbed and ill-equipped father struggles to reconnect with his estranged and embittered son following his discovery of his affair with another woman. Wanting to defend his mother’s honor, his son decides to seek revenge on the mistress.

programme.title: Buried
programme.desc: After the murder of his fiancée and her lover, Cameron escapes Atlanta under a new identity and loses the trail of the investigators. When he meets Lauren after settling in Florida, his cover begins to crack when a neighbor begins asking questions, and opening secrets that are supposed to be buried.

programme.title: A Secret Lie in Love
programme.desc: Clarice and Chase Scott have the perfect suburban life on the outside. However, their marriage that was built on passion, has become a battlefield of deceit, infidelity, and betrayal. Clarice finds solace in the arms of another man, while Chase’s greed seems to unravel everything they’ve built. Will their marriage survive?

programme.title: The Queens Court
programme.desc: The Queens Court is an underground, all female organization that rules on all criminal activity in the city. Nothing is done without the queens courts verdict first, and those who fail to comply will be dealt with, by any means necessary.

programme.title: Gimme the Loot
programme.desc: Big Poppa and Ms. Wallace own and operate their own gentleman’s club, “Gimme the Loot” that’s funded by their criminal earnings. Their revenue is partly earned by their exotic dancers they recruit, who double as their crew to execute heists and bank robberies. But when the new crew finds themselves entangled in a high-stakes world of loyalty, secrets, and danger, their loyalties will be tested, and the crew have to decide if “The Loot” is really worth it.

programme.title: ToxiCity
programme.desc: Corey Spencer, the innovator behind the successful ATLUV dating app, navigates a complex personal life. Despite his app's mission, he struggles with love, further complicated by a child support order. A night out leads him to Sierra, an alluring actress who quickly moves in. Their romance sours as Sierra's past as a dancer and her aggressive jealousy come to light.

Locked away for 400 days, the crew's mental state begins to deteriorate when they lose all communication with the outside world. Forced to exit the ship, they wonder if the mission is a simulation after all.

programme.title: Itsy Bitsy
programme.desc: A story tangled up in a web of family drama, personal demons, and a horrifying monster.Based on the centuries-old poem, a family moves into a secluded mansion where they soon find themselves being targeted by an ancient entity taking the form of a giant spider.Kara, a private nurse and single mother, moves from the big city to the quiet countryside with her two children, 13-year-old Jesse and 8-year-old Cambria, to live with and take care of an elderly man with multiple sclerosis. Things seem normal enough until Jesse discovers a mysterious old relic in the old man's house, leading to unexpected and horrifying things coming to life.

programme.title: Mermaid Down
programme.desc: A mermaid is ripped from the Pacific, her tail is chopped off and she's thrown into a mental home where no one believes she is a mermaid.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California, like diving suits and a boat, and a television set, which Granny thinks is some kind of fancy washing machine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Land of Hunted Men
programme.desc: A band of outlaws is terrorizing a town in the West. Leave it to Ray Crash Corrigan and his Range Busters to ride in and save the day. This film marked the return of Corrigan to the famous series; he had appeared in the first sixteen movies but left for a brief hiatus following 1942's ARIZONA STAGECOACH. This was the 21st of 24 movies in the Range Busters series. Produced between 1940-1943, the Range Busters were a huge financial success for Monogram Pictures.

programme.title: Phantom Ranger

The incredibly daring Hayes infiltrates a gang that has kidnapped a Treasury Department engraver. Under the direction of Poverty Row icon Sam Newfield, McCoy turns in another of his legendary slam-bang performances, making Phantom Ranger a perennial favorite of B-Western fans.

programme.title: Young Bill Hickock

Starring Sally Payne as Calamity Jane, and Rogerss ongoing sidekick George Gabby Hayes, this twofisted saga relives some of Americas most colorful days, and also has time for a few musical numbers, including Up and Down the Prairie, and When the Shadows Fall Across the Rockies.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.desc: The roar of 12,000-pound titans descends upon the Paycom Center as Monster Jam Replay heads to Oklahoma City for Round 7 of the Arena Championship Series West. The energy is electric in "Loud City" as elite drivers face off in a high-stakes triple-threat of JCB Racing, the technical Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, and the chaotic brilliance of Freestyle. Witness a tense racing tiebreaker between Carson Williams and Ashley Sanford, and watch as Armando Castro and Tim Hall Jr. battle for critical series points. From Alex Bardin’s vertical precision in EarthShaker to Blake Granger’s powerful pursuit of a "redemption arc" in Monster Mutt Dalmatian, this episode captures the raw power and heart-pounding drama that only Monster Jam can deliver.

Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam has been operating under the assumption that his three children are little angels, but when his wife decides to rejoin the workforce after being a stay-at-home mom for 13 years, and he starts taking on more of the parenting responsibilities, he's quickly disavowed of that notion. Kate, a preteen, is a master manipulator and excited to take advantage of her father's naivete; Teddy spends too much time with his hands down his pants; and Emme frets over school. After recovering from the initial shock -- and with the advice of equally stressed parents Marie and Lowell -- Adam is confident he can lay down the law and keep the house in order.

Now, the festival lends its famous name to this hidden-camera prank show starring a Quebec-based troupe. Canada is the stage and its inhabitants are the characters -- some might say victims -- for the "Candid Camera"-style pranks featured on the half-hour series. Although the pranks last just a few minutes each, that's just long enough to inflict embarrassment on the subjects of the pranks.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. Few other words in the English language have such power to make our hearts beat faster and our mouths water than sizzling slabs of beef seared over live fire. In this show we embark on some meaty globe hopping, exploring over-the-top steaks from France, Cambodia, and the American Southwest. Hot fire. Sizzling meat. It’s a carnivore’s dream come true.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Let Texans brag about brisket and Carolinians praise pulled pork shoulder. For the rest of us, the ultimate symbol of barbecue is ribs. In the American Midwest, ribs mean baby backs or other pork ribs, while in Korea, the bone of choice is the beef short rib. In the eastern Mediterranean, lamb ribs reign supreme. In this show we give you three of the best ribs ever.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Killer Barbecue – Hold the Meat You don’t need a degree in barbecue to know that vegetables have hit the grill big time. Veggies for hardcore carnivores who crave killer accompaniments to their meats, for health-conscious grillers, and for everyone who delights in the smokiness and supernatural sweetness live fire imparts to plant and dairy foods.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Charm City ‘Que: Baltimore, the town where I grew up, boasts plenty of awesome foods for grilling. Pit beef was born here. In the seafood department you find a sweet white-fleshed fish the rest of the world calls striped bass and Baltimoreans know as rockfish. And no Charm City meal would be complete without chocolate top cookies.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue on a Budget: A lot of American barbecue began with inexpensive meat cuts, like spareribs, beef shoulder, and pork belly. With the economic insecurities brought on by COVID- 9, we’re all feeling the pinch, and budget grilling has taken on new urgency. Besides, why should Kobe beef and tomahawk steaks get all the love? This is barbecue on a budget.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Sustainable Seafood: Pollution. Overfishing. Abusive labor practices. There’s a lot of negative news coming out about the seafood industry lately, and much of it breaks your heart. Today’s show celebrates seafood we can eat because it’s fished in a way that’s humane and environmentally sound. Activists call it sustainable seafood. I call it three great reasons for firing up your grill.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Social Distance Tailgating: From its humble origins on the back of a buckboard wagon to today’s high-octane outdoor foodie extravaganzas, tailgating continues to enthrall—make that obsess—American sports fans. This episode is our our annual celebration of tailgating with a global twist. The socializing may be distant this year—all the more reason to up your game at the grill.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Little Italy: When I was growing up, a trip to Baltimore’s Little Italy always meant culinary adventure. Today we celebrate Italian grilling and the food of Little Italys around North America, honoring the Italian reverence for simplicity and fresh seasonal ingredients, and the American passion for big flavors and ingenious grilling techniques.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Cured and Smoked: In humankind’s long march to food security, two ancient preserving techniques have stood out over the millennia: curing and smoking. The first involves preserving foods with salt, soy sauce, or sodium nitrite, and the second technique involves blasting foods with flavorful clouds of wood smoke. Today, we’re pushing the envelope on traditional curing and smoking.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Coffee expert Joey Chase goes on a pilgrimage along an ancient Ethiopian trading route that starts with the modern latte art cafes in Addis Ababa, then through the coffee kingdom of Jimma to the 10,000+-year-old wild coffee Yayu Forest. Village elders share the age-old secrets of hand processing, fire-pit roasting, and brewing of beans followed by a traditional feast.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: After sharing a first-ever taste of coffee in a remote Maasai village, followed by an exploration of the terrain with some new-found friends, Joey explores a grandiose coffee estate in Mt. Kenya. He then jousts with coffee buyers in Nairbobi's auction house and experiences the hand sorting and elaborate tasting of over 100 distinctive coffees in a British Tudor-style plantation cottage.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Touting the practicality of gondola travel, Joey explores the canals of Venice and discovers the oldest coffee shop in Europe. The trail to classic Italian espresso leads from Illy Coffee near the high-fashion metropolis of Trieste to the medieval town of Scarperia where espresso machines are manufactured. Florence boasts a famous barista who prepares a masterful farewell espresso.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: An exploration of Paris's distinctive cafe culture reveals a renaissance of coffee-inspired cuisine, pastries, and spirits. World-renowned "Noses" in the south of France reveal the complex contribution that fragrance and aroma make toward the perfect cup as Joey pursues the development of a coffee perfume.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Bob Marley's son Rohan takes Joey on a journey from the streets of Kingston to the peaks of the Blue Mountains. From waterfall plunges and grazing tropical fruits on Rohan's farm to roasting the smoothest coffee on earth and enjoying a Jamaican feast that ends with a Marley-hosted jam session, Joey discovers the pulse of Jamaica through the lens of Marley Coffee.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: From four-star cuisine to cappuccino on horseback, Joey explores the historic cobblestone streets and coffee estates of Antigua. A puddle jumper flight along the rims of active volcanoes leads to the age-old Mayan towns around Lake Atitlan where coffee-harvesting communities offer a glimpse of ancient traditions.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: The pursuit of the sweetest "honey" coffees on earth unleashes an adventure that includes "coffee monkeys", crocodiles, toucans, an exploration of the active crater of Volcan Poas, and surfing on the coast with a coffee farmer. The Costa Rican paradise reveals a uniquely artistic approach toward colorful honey coffees stored like wine and served just in time for a classic "coffee sock" brew.

programme.desc: Friendly and feisty, Scotland makes us feel right at home. Then we head to historic St. Andrew's to practice our swing on the world's most famous golf course.

programme.title: Laura McKenzie's Traveler
programme.desc: First stops are Camden Market and Notting Hill Gate. Enjoy a treat as Laura escorts you to the birthplace of pomp and circumstance, Buckingham Palace. Then mosey down to Windsor Castle before taking on London with Big Ben and Tower Bridge.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Music and dance are core attributes of Ireland's culture. Mickela learns the Riverdance step in Dublin, and the penny whistle at Gus O'Connor's Pub in Doolin. She also attends a matchmaking festival, and Ireland's oldest weekly set dances.

programme.title: Tastes Like Home
programme.desc: Hoping to bring a taste of home to Lisa in Vancouver, Lisa's mother Mary shares with Catherine a modern twist on Roscommon Spring Lamb Cutlets with Apricot Barbecue Glaze, Roast Vegetables with a Couscous Salad, and Harissa style dressing.

programme.title: Andiamo! Uptown
programme.desc: In the second part of her tour of Alberta, Canada, you and Donna will discover fresh cuisine at the local farmer's market and explore some of the region's crafts. You will also go snowshoeing and learn how to ski.

programme.title: Laura McKenzie's Traveler
programme.desc: Hawaii is a big draw for those seeking something unique. "The Big Island" is volcanic and features 11 different climate zones, allowing visitors to experience many different environments. Also, explore one of the most incredible resort destinations.

programme.title: Laura McKenzie's Traveler
programme.desc: Edinburgh Castle stands boldly atop Castle Rock. Visit St. Margaret's Chapel, the oldest building in Edinburgh, and become acquainted with the legend of Greyfriars Bobby. programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Rural Japan: Tony decides to look for a more relaxing, traditional Japanese culinary experience in the countryside. Tony travels to an old-style Japanese inn that specializes in kaiseki cuisine, ancient tea ceremony, and local ingredients.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY: Passionate about his city, Tony gives us an intimate tour of the New York City foods he loves - sturgeon and bagels, fluke ceviche, pan-seared foie gras, braised veal cheek, authentic cheese and, of course, a hotdog.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: When I Grow Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: What do you want to be when you grow up? Maybe a firefighter? Or an astronaut? Or maybe a dancer? Practice talking about jobs and careers with this super simple and super fun song, “When I Grow Up”.

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Kids Songs - Super Simple Songs
programme.desc: 20 fun Super Simple Songs with Baby Shark, Five Little Ducks, Mr. Golden Sun, Ice Cream Song, and more!

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Kasja and her dad use Super Wings’ food truck to serve pancakes in space despite a rock belt. Jett and Traver restore power in Brazil by fixing the dam and reversing Iguaçu Falls.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Tino, with teamwork, capture a giant dragonfly and let it go. Gita and the Super Wings save the town from a snowball using cricket skills to handle playful baby yetis.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Marty, and Windy build a landing field to save World Spaceport from crashing. At the Harbin festival, Super Wings fix chaos caused by GG's enlarged Ruyi Bang staff.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Traver rescue a lizard 'dragon' in a rebuilt castle. Super Wings and Golden Siblings fix Alma's Northern Lights photos.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, Jett's drained batteries struggle with an enlarged Times Square ball after time-traveling with the Super Wings for the countdown.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Novice Jibby, with Super Wings' help, lands safely in the Alps for Super Band's show. In Pixel-land, Alice and friends, aided by Super Wings, conquer challenges to enjoy fireworks.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Haruto's robot Metatron breaks down, activating villain Titan. Meanwhile, Jett and Marty build a rollercoaster and use magnets to reroute a stalled mile-long train.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Super Space Scouts and Jett, Matthew, and Dizzy chase a giant ball through a black hole. They save Earth from a moon-sized ball and deliver it to Mars.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Chloe and Dad escape a pterosaur world with a special glider after a time slip. Jett swaps roles, causing chaos with an inflatable duck, and learns teamwork.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Super Wings take Kamal and Nadia to the dinosaur era for a sports showdown, revealing all dinosaurs' strengths. In Scotland, they fix an inflatable playground for exhausted Nessie.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Lucie clean Amara's dad's underwater base and help an injured shark. Julian's safety gear interview reveals a crane's trouble and a forklift's heroics.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy help Louis with a chaotic tennis match and AI machine, leading to his success. Jett and Lucie recover a lost golden record from an alien spacecraft, sparking joy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At Noah’s park, Camira hunts block dino eggs with Super Wings, facing surprises when Golden Girl snatches the prize and the egg escapes! Powered by new pod gear, Camira triumphs, while Jett braves the Sahara to find Latu and a fennec fox.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy jet to Jeju, helping Taehoon’s robot save Grandma’s shellfish from a giant fish, then team up to free it. On Mars, Jett and Marty chase Roy's lost bags, while Jinga dazzles with an out-of-this-world tour.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy join Hazel and Runi in Australia to help animals escape wildfires, then fly to Seoul where tiny Antny enters the Strongest Bug Contest, faces rampaging rivals, and, with Super Wings’ upgrades, helps save the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Marty help wash Maxy the giant plane and calm geysers at Oyunuma Pond, then deliver a Wright Flyer to Braden, sparking a time-hop to the Wright brothers, where teamwork lifts spirits and the Flyer takes flight.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating animals from across the globe! Dance and sing along with puppets and discover some of the world's most unique creatures. Join us to dance along to classical melodies as we learn animal names through narration and repetition or simply enjoy seeing live-action footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpy & More Kids Rhymes (Little Treehouse)
programme.desc: Do you kids know what happened to Humpty Dumpty when he sat on the wall? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with the Little Tree House gang, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Halloween Non-Stop - Kids TV
programme.desc: Celebrate this Halloween night with spooky scary Halloween songs for kids, showcasing popular easy to learn nursery rhymes & educational kids videos for babies and toddlers. programme.title: Super Supremes No No Song + More Nursery Rhymes & Kids Songs
programme.desc: Here comes non-stop english rhymes for kids by the Supremes, so stay tuned with us and enjoy listening to your favorite nursery rhymes!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: It's that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom - and it looks like this is going to be a bumper crop! Strawberry decides to celebrate the event with a first-ever Berry Big Berry Blossom Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One night, as Strawberry & Friends gaze at the stars, they talk about what they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure. A disappointed Honey proves to be a very impatient patient, that is until Strawberry Shortcake and her friends work together telling stories and...

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Conniving Peppermint Fizz talks the other kids into a competition to see whose pet is best. Peppermint cheats so that her pet, Cola Chameleon, wins best pet. But she is surprised when the other kids don't care who won.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is feeling left out of all the kids' play. She's the only one with four legs. There's no one like her to talk to and share her feelings. So Strawberry and the others take Honey Pie to Ice Cream Island - a land of horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Angel Cake likes everything "just so" - and when things don't go her way, she's a pretty bad sport... until Strawberry & Apple Dumplin' help her become the berry best of sports.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz is so determined to win the Nearly Once-A-Yearly Strawberryland Games, she resorts to cheating.

programme.desc: Thomas delivers Sir Topham Hatt’s new car and takes the school choir to a concert.

programme.desc: Diesel teases Thomas for being stinky and Percy is given four jobs.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends

programme.desc: The little narrow gauge engines bring sheep to safety. Then, Duncan finds a new job.

programme.desc: The brothers take to the African Savanah to examine the mighty leopard.

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: The brothers look at time: when creatures do what they do, and how important timing is!

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: The brothers examine creatures who live in the hot and dry Australian Outback.

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: Martin and Chris head to the Florida Everglades to examine crocodiles and alligators.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ, and the kids to play with her instead of working in their garden. They promise to play with her as soon as they finish. Baby Bop can't wait, and tries many ways to get them to come play with her now, none of which work. When her friends do come to play, they have a tea party and enjoy some of the fresh things from the garden. When Riff hears a mysterious sound in the park, he plays detective, trying to solve the mystery. Barney and the children join in the fun. Along the way, they explore the sense of sound while identifying sounds of nature and the neighborhood.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After BJ loses everyone's tickets to the circus, he sets out to find them and learns a valuable lesson about responsibility. Baby Bop discovers a lonely little flower struggling to grow in a shady spot. She takes it to a sunny spot, nurtures it, and is thrilled when the flower blooms. When the flower dies on a cold day, Barney and friends help her gain hope for the future.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three children try to build a pretend farm, but have a hard time working together. Barney takes them to a ranch to show them how all the people there have to work together to keep things running smoothly. Riff invents a Happiness Machine to try to cheer up a sad little girl. But it's her friends, not the machine, that make her happy!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ wants to learn Terry's fancy basketball moves. He tries hard, but just can't seem to do it! More importantly, he's not even having fun anymore. After some advice from Barney and Terry, BJ has fun while doing his best! On a campout, Baby Bop sees a falling star and wants to return it to the sky. With a little imagination and help from Barney and friends, she replaces the star that fell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Everyone loves Barney! When Ryan tries to be just like Barney, he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Ryan soon learns that he is special when he's just being himself! Baby Bop is having one of those days! Every time she turns around, someone is telling her no! As her frustration grows, Barney explains that the word no can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: There's a fishing contest in the park! When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells The Emperor's Contest and Ryan discovers that honesty is the best policy. When Riff meets a friend who can't hear well, Riff wonders if he would still like music. Barney tells everyone about Beethoven, a famous musician who wrote beautiful music even though he couldn't hear it.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Everyone is excited for Halloween tonight! Everyone knows what they're going to be for Halloween. BJ is going to be a pirate, Melanie is going to be a cat, David will be a superhero, and Baby Bop is going to be a ballerina princess. Everyone has decided on a costume all except for Riff. Barney tries to give Riff ideas on a costume like a sailor, a firefighter, or a dancer. Riff surprises everyone in the end by wearing a one-man band costume. Then, it's time for the Halloween party to begin! Barney and his friends have fun Trick-or-Treating in the park at night. But when Ramon loses all his Halloween candies, BJ shares his Halloween candies with him.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ feels left out when the kids have a Dog Show to show off their pets. BJ doesn't have a dog and wishes he did! A friend shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun. Barney's friends are having a hard time deciding what to do because everyone wants to do the same thing! Barney's Native American tale, The Chase, shows them that it's best to think for themselves and not follow the crowd.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The kids use this opportunity to explore the creation of different colors by mixing them together. Inspired by this delightful turn of events, Barney and the kids organize a surprise party for Colleen, entirely centered around her most beloved color: purple.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Excitedly recounting her recent sleepover, Beth shares the fun moments she had with her friends at night. After the kids wish to see nighttime, so Barney uses this opportunity to transform the park, and explain the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Stumbling upon Mr. Boyd and Bingo repairing a player piano, Barney recognizes a wonderful chance for learning and exploration with the kids. Excitedly, the children engage in playful games, immersing themselves in the delightful sounds of real pianos and even play a few notes themselves. Through this experience, they gain great knowledge about the piano, all with the guidance and encouragement of Barney and their newfound curiosity.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Together, the kids use their creativity to create a drawing depicting Barney and themselves having a blast playing baseball. After playing a game of imaginary baseball, they bring Barney into the fun. After accidentally hurting BJ's feelings by forgetting to add him to the drawing, Barney and the children learn what it takes to be a good friend. BJ realizes he has many friends and enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids explore the wonderful world of counting by playing a variety of fun games, like Barney may I? Barney and the kids help Baby Bop learn how to count to 10 by including her in games, and by taking her on a make-believe shopping trip in the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. When Nick expresses his concern about being the smallest among the kids, Barney steps in to demonstrate how each person's unique size holds its own usefulness. When the group heads out to the park, they begin a creative retelling of Jack and the Beanstalk. Barney and his friends discover everyone is special, regardless of size.

programme.title: America's Secret War
programme.desc: While the United States was publicly engaged in the Vietnam War, a secret military operation under the command of the CIA was being waged in the neighboring nation of Laos. At a concealed airbase in the heart of the country, the CIA trained an army of allied guerilla fighters to destroy enemy supply lines. AMERICA'S SECRET WAR uncovers the history of this covert mission.

programme.title: Bob Dole, Italy and World War 2
programme.desc: Some of the most brutal, merciless and chaotic fighting of World War II took part in the mountains of Italy and lasted until the final days of the war. Even as the Allies advanced into the heart of Berlin in May of 1945, the battle for Italy continued. Many soldiers were affected by their time fighting in Italy and the horrific conditions they faced there. BOB DOLE, ITALY AND WORLD WAR II is about those who lived through one of World War IIs most desperate fights, including the young lieutenant from Kansas whose unforgettable ordeal in Italy would shape his life of public service.

programme.title: World War II: Saving the Reality
programme.desc: Narrated by Dan Aykroyd. Tells the story of an individual who owns the largest private collection of World War II artifacts in the world. Over 50 interviews with veterans and survivors of the war help tell the story of the meaning of the over 7,000 individual items in the collection of Kenneth W. Rendell.

programme.title: Surrender on the USS Missouri
programme.desc: On September 2nd, 1945, World War II came to its official end aboard a legendary battleship anchored in Tokyo Bay: the USS Missouri. Some seventy million people had died during the war, but now the fighting would end not with a rifle shot but rather with the swift stroke of a ceremonial pen.SURRENDER ON THE USS MISSOURI focuses on the sailors, soldiers, airmen and marines that witnessed the official Japanese surrender. It was one of the most monumental days in history, and only a few witnesses remain.The USS Missouri hadn't been in the fight long, heading into the Pacific theater of war in 1944, but she would become one of the most famous military ships in history when all was said and done. Mighty Mo had been involved in the vicious fight at Iwo Jima and then headed for Okinawa, where she dodged suicidal Kamikaze air attacks during World War II's last great battle. Missouri then bombed Japan before being told to leave the coast for no apparent reason. The reason turned out to be two atomic bombs that were set to be dropped on the cities of Hiroshima and Nagasaki.Through interviews with those who served on the battleship, the film also follows the USS Missouri from its construction, through varied battles in the Pacific, to its final resting place as a memorial and museum in Pearl Harbor.SURRENDER ON THE USS MISSOURI features exclusive drone footage of the Missouri, plus never-before-seen photos of the surrender ceremony provided by those who were there. Pacific War historian Daniel Martinez also lends his perspective to the film.

programme.title: Rommel: The Soldier, The Son, and Hitler
programme.desc: ROMMEL: THE SOLDIER, THE SON, AND HITLER provides rare insight into the military career and personal life of Germany's most famous WWII commander, Field Marshal Erwin Rommel. Told from the perspective of Erwin's son Manfred, it is the story of what happens when a career soldier runs afoul of a dictator.Highly decorated and one of Hitler's favorite commanders in the early years of World War II, the Desert Fox, as his British adversaries labeled him, was somewhat of an enigma. Never a member of the Nazi party, Rommel detested the blending of politics and war. He would quickly discover that both were always in play in Hitler's Germany.Rommel was somewhat nave to Hitler's ways until the latter days of the Afrika Korps defeat in North Africa in 1943. By then, Rommel started to surmise that Germany's fate was sealed. In charge of the famed and flawed Atlantic Wall in western Europe in late 1943, Rommel tried his best to prepare France for the Allied invasion. In the end, it would not be enough. D-Day's success only reinforced Rommel's belief that Adolf Hitler should sue for peace in the west.It was an opinion that Hitler found treasonous.

programme.title: World War II: Saving the Reality
programme.desc: Narrated by Dan Aykroyd. Tells the story of an individual who owns the largest private collection of World War II artifacts in the world. Over 50 interviews with veterans and survivors of the war help tell the story of the meaning of the over 7,000 individual items in the collection of Kenneth W. Rendell.
